name: reel_2026-04-18_001
caption:
This $47 cover made my destroyed couch look new.

Pet hair, stains, scratched armrests — I was embarrassed to have people over. Reupholstery quotes were $500+. Not happening.

Found the Mamma Mia waterproof stretch cover on Amazon. I was skeptical. I was wrong.

One afternoon. No tools. Stretches on like it was custom-made.

Now my couch looks like I spent real money on it.

Link in bio.

name: reel_2026-04-18_002
caption:
I spent $34 and my bathroom cabinet looks like a spa.

Before: bottles falling out every morning, tangled cords, couldn't find anything without pulling the whole thing apart.

After: bamboo tiered shelves, pull-out drawer, everything visible and accessible. Took 5 minutes. No tools. One Amazon box.

I was skeptical bamboo could look this good under a sink. I was wrong.

name: reel_2026-04-18_003
caption:
I spent $89 on a pillow and my neck pain is gone.

I woke up stiff every single morning for years. Tried stacking pillows, rolling towels under my neck, flipping to the cold side. Nothing fixed it.

My pillow was a flat, yellowed pancake I just kept not replacing.

The Eli & Elm side sleeper pillow has a curved cutout so your shoulder actually has somewhere to go. You adjust the fill until the loft is exactly right.

First morning after: no neck grab. I was skeptical. I was wrong.

$89 is the best sleep money I've ever spent.

Link in bio.

#sidesleeper #neckpainrelief #sleepbetter #pillowupgrade #springwellness2026 #adjustablepillow #sleepwellness
